desc: Confirm final headcount — short notes.
due: Ceremony music cue sheet delivered to the string trio for review.
name: Confirm final headcount

desc: Send deposit invoice — short notes.
due: Seating chart passed to the venue Saturday morning — one late RSVP still pending.
name: Send deposit invoice

desc: Becca: draft social post schedule — short notes.
due: Post-event breakdown crew booked, hitting the venue by 11 PM as agreed.
name: Becca: draft social post schedule

desc: Lock catering menu with Marco — short notes.
due: Family shot list confirmed with the couple, twenty groupings total.
name: Lock catering menu with Marco

desc: Build day-of timeline — short notes.
due: Guest transportation shuttle confirmed for the 2 PM ceremony start.
name: Build day-of timeline

desc: Update preferred vendor list — short notes.
due: Vendor arrival window finalized with Ivan — florals 1 PM, cake 2 PM.
name: Update preferred vendor list

desc: Floral order — Tessa — short notes.
due: Final headcount locked at 142, no more adjustments accepted after Friday.
name: Floral order — Tessa

desc: Confirm DJ song list with Rafael — short notes.
due: Bride's hair and makeup call time set for 10:30 AM at the bridal suite.
name: Confirm DJ song list with Rafael

desc: Review monthly bookkeeping — short notes.
due: Confirmed with Marco on the plated dinner count, entree split is 60/40 chicken/salmon.
name: Review monthly bookkeeping

desc: Venue walkthrough at Riverside Estate — short notes.
due: Tessa flagged that the peonies may be substituted for garden roses if supply is tight.
name: Venue walkthrough at Riverside Estate

desc: Book photographer Carlos for engagement shoot — short notes.
due: Timeline dropped to the couple, first look at 3:15 and ceremony at 5:00 sharp.
name: Book photographer Carlos for engagement shoot

desc: Plan Monday kickoff with Becca — short notes.
due: Second walk-through with the venue coordinator scheduled Thursday afternoon.
name: Plan Monday kickoff with Becca

desc: Finalize seating chart — short notes.
due: Vendor tips already accounted for in the final billing packet, ready to send Sunday.
name: Finalize seating chart

desc: Confirm videographer coverage with Angela — short notes.
due: Rain plan for the outdoor ceremony revisited with the couple — tent on standby.
name: Confirm videographer coverage with Angela

desc: Order client welcome gifts — short notes.
due: Bar package finalized: signature cocktail approved, one gin one bourbon based.
name: Order client welcome gifts

desc: Collect vendor COIs — short notes.
due: DJ has the do-not-play list and the parent dance songs correct on his sheet.
name: Collect vendor COIs

desc: Book photographer Carlos for engagement shoot — short notes.
due: Photographer is arriving 45 minutes ahead of the getting-ready window.
name: Floral order — Tessa

desc: Becca: draft social post schedule — short notes.
due: Cake tasting rescheduled for the following Wednesday morning at Priya's shop.
name: Floral order — Tessa

desc: Update preferred vendor list — short notes.
due: Rehearsal dinner venue confirmed for Friday evening, transportation covered.
name: Book photographer Carlos for engagement shoot

desc: Build day-of timeline — short notes.
due: Officiant received the final vow arrangement and the pronouncement wording.
name: Book photographer Carlos for engagement shoot
